title: TooltipUtils
description: Some quality of life features for tooltips
body:
Adds quality of life options for tooltips.

**Requires [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)**

![Cut off tooltip with expand text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a86d3a7dc5dbaf2ebe8ffc13763b339338f2b872.png)# Tooltip utils

## Features
- Scrollable tooltips
- Scalable tooltips
- Compact tooltips (expand with Shift key)
- Lock tooltip position
